task_completion.description: Verify that the Sygic GPS Navigation app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Settings menu is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Settings menu of the Sygic app is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Route & Navigation' settings screen is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen titled 'Route & Navigation' or similar route settings page is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the route computing options are displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or list showing route computing options such as 'Fastest', 'Shortest', and 'Economic' is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Shortest' route calculation method is selected and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Shortest' option is selected (e.g., indicated by a radio button, checkmark, or highlighted text) in the route computing settings.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Sygic GPS Navigation app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Sygic app UI, not a web browser, text editor, or search engine.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GUI to change the setting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show step-by-step GUI navigation rather than terminal commands or scripts being executed.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show genuine app interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements match a real Android application interface without signs of being a mockup or static image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target app is Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura). The route settings are located in Menu -> Settings -> Route & Navigation. The route computing options include Fastest, Shortest, and Economic. The target setting to be selected is 'Shortest'.
